auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Formbricks management API key sent with the x-api-key header. Generate or manage it from the Formbricks API key settings: https://formbricks.com/docs/api-reference/generate-key

actions.name: create_contact
actions.description: Create one Formbricks contact with a workspace-scoped attributes object.

workspaceId.description: The Formbricks workspace identifier used by this action.

environmentId.description: The deprecated environment identifier alias accepted by Formbricks for compatibility.

email.description: The contact email address used by Formbricks as the unique identifier.

additionalProperties.description: One additional string-valued contact attribute stored on the Formbricks contact.

attributes.description: The Formbricks contact attributes object. It must include a valid email address.

inputSchema.description: The payload for creating one Formbricks contact.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the contact was created.

workspaceId.description: The workspace identifier that owns the contact.

anyOf.description: The deprecated environment identifier alias returned by Formbricks.

attributes.description: The string-valued contact attributes stored in Formbricks.

contact.description: A normalized Formbricks contact returned by the connector.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Formbricks contact creation response.

actions.name: create_contact_attribute_key
actions.description: Create one Formbricks contact attribute key inside a workspace.

workspaceId.description: The Formbricks workspace identifier used by this action.

environmentId.description: The deprecated environment identifier alias accepted by Formbricks for compatibility.

key.description: The machine-readable attribute key to create in Formbricks.

anyOf.description: The display name for the new Formbricks attribute key.
The description for the new Formbricks attribute key.

inputSchema.description: The payload for creating one Formbricks contact attribute key.

id.description: The Formbricks contact attribute key identifier.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the attribute key was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the attribute key was last updated.

isUnique.description: Whether the attribute key is marked as unique across contacts in the workspace.

key.description: The machine-readable attribute key used in Formbricks.

anyOf.description: The display name configured for the attribute key.
The description configured for the attribute key.

type.description: Whether Formbricks marks this key as default or custom.

workspaceId.description: The workspace identifier that owns the attribute key.

anyOf.description: The deprecated environment identifier alias returned by Formbricks.

raw.description: The raw Formbricks contact attribute key payload.

contactAttributeKey.description: A normalized Formbricks contact attribute key.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Formbricks contact attribute key creation response.

actions.name: delete_contact_attribute_key
actions.description: Delete one Formbricks contact attribute key by its identifier.

contactAttributeKeyId.description: The Formbricks contact attribute key identifier to fetch, update, or delete.

inputSchema.description: The identifier for one Formbricks contact attribute key.

id.description: The Formbricks contact attribute key identifier.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the attribute key was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the attribute key was last updated.

isUnique.description: Whether the attribute key is marked as unique across contacts in the workspace.

key.description: The machine-readable attribute key used in Formbricks.

anyOf.description: The display name configured for the attribute key.
The description configured for the attribute key.

type.description: Whether Formbricks marks this key as default or custom.

workspaceId.description: The workspace identifier that owns the attribute key.

anyOf.description: The deprecated environment identifier alias returned by Formbricks.

raw.description: The raw Formbricks contact attribute key payload.

contactAttributeKey.description: A normalized Formbricks contact attribute key.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Formbricks contact attribute key deletion response.

actions.name: get_contact_attribute_key
actions.description: Get one Formbricks contact attribute key by its identifier.

contactAttributeKeyId.description: The Formbricks contact attribute key identifier to fetch, update, or delete.

inputSchema.description: The identifier for one Formbricks contact attribute key.

id.description: The Formbricks contact attribute key identifier.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the attribute key was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the attribute key was last updated.

isUnique.description: Whether the attribute key is marked as unique across contacts in the workspace.

key.description: The machine-readable attribute key used in Formbricks.

anyOf.description: The display name configured for the attribute key.
The description configured for the attribute key.

type.description: Whether Formbricks marks this key as default or custom.

workspaceId.description: The workspace identifier that owns the attribute key.

anyOf.description: The deprecated environment identifier alias returned by Formbricks.

raw.description: The raw Formbricks contact attribute key payload.

contactAttributeKey.description: A normalized Formbricks contact attribute key.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Formbricks contact attribute key detail response.

actions.name: get_me
actions.description: Get the Formbricks organization and workspace context associated with the current API key.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for retrieving the current Formbricks API key context.

read.description: Whether the API key can read organization-level data.

write.description: Whether the API key can write organization-level data.

accessControl.description: The read and write access flags for the API key.

organizationAccess.description: The organization-level access control returned by Formbricks.

anyOf.description: The deprecated environment identifier alias when returned by Formbricks.

environmentType.description: The Formbricks environment type for the workspace.

permission.description: The permission level granted to this API key for the workspace.

projectId.description: The Formbricks project identifier that owns the workspace.

projectName.description: The Formbricks project name that owns the workspace.

items.description: One Formbricks workspace summary returned by /me.

workspaces.description: The workspaces accessible to the API key.

anyOf.description: The deprecated environment identifier alias when returned by Formbricks.

environmentType.description: The Formbricks environment type for the workspace.

permission.description: The permission level granted to this API key for the workspace.

projectId.description: The Formbricks project identifier that owns the workspace.

projectName.description: The Formbricks project name that owns the workspace.

items.description: One Formbricks workspace summary returned by /me.

environments.description: The deprecated environments alias returned by Formbricks when present.

outputSchema.description: The Formbricks /me payload normalized by the connector.

actions.name: list_contact_attribute_keys
actions.description: List Formbricks contact attribute keys with optional pagination, sorting, date filters, and workspace scoping.

workspaceId.description: The Formbricks workspace identifier used by this action.

environmentId.description: The deprecated environment identifier alias accepted by Formbricks for compatibility.

limit.description: The maximum number of attribute keys to return.

skip.description: The number of attribute keys to skip before returning results.

sortBy.description: The Formbricks field used to sort the returned attribute keys.

order.description: The sort order for the returned Formbricks attribute keys.

startDate.description: An optional start-date filter passed through to Formbricks exactly as provided.

endDate.description: An optional end-date filter passed through to Formbricks exactly as provided.

filterDateField.description: The Formbricks date field used for start/end filtering.

inputSchema.description: Optional filters for listing Formbricks contact attribute keys.

id.description: The Formbricks contact attribute key identifier.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the attribute key was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the attribute key was last updated.

isUnique.description: Whether the attribute key is marked as unique across contacts in the workspace.

key.description: The machine-readable attribute key used in Formbricks.

anyOf.description: The display name configured for the attribute key.
The description configured for the attribute key.

type.description: Whether Formbricks marks this key as default or custom.

workspaceId.description: The workspace identifier that owns the attribute key.

anyOf.description: The deprecated environment identifier alias returned by Formbricks.

raw.description: The raw Formbricks contact attribute key payload.

items.description: A normalized Formbricks contact attribute key.

contactAttributeKeys.description: The contact attribute keys returned by Formbricks.

total.description: The total number of matching Formbricks attribute keys.

limit.description: The number of attribute keys Formbricks returned per page.

offset.description: The offset Formbricks applied to this result page.

meta.description: Pagination metadata returned for Formbricks contact attribute key lists.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Formbricks contact attribute key list response.

actions.name: update_contact_attribute_key
actions.description: Update one existing Formbricks contact attribute key.

contactAttributeKeyId.description: The Formbricks contact attribute key identifier to fetch, update, or delete.

anyOf.description: An updated display name for the attribute key.
An updated description for the attribute key.

inputSchema.description: The partial update payload for one Formbricks contact attribute key.

id.description: The Formbricks contact attribute key identifier.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the attribute key was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the attribute key was last updated.

isUnique.description: Whether the attribute key is marked as unique across contacts in the workspace.

key.description: The machine-readable attribute key used in Formbricks.

anyOf.description: The display name configured for the attribute key.
The description configured for the attribute key.

type.description: Whether Formbricks marks this key as default or custom.

workspaceId.description: The workspace identifier that owns the attribute key.

anyOf.description: The deprecated environment identifier alias returned by Formbricks.

raw.description: The raw Formbricks contact attribute key payload.

contactAttributeKey.description: A normalized Formbricks contact attribute key.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Formbricks contact attribute key update response.
